parsed.name: driver-compare-insert
parsed.description: Single-row INSERT throughput — pycubrid (Pure Python) vs CUBRIDdb (C extension). Same CUBRID 11.2 server, same CAS protocol, isolates driver implementation.

queries:
CREATE TABLE bench_insert (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  amount INT NOT NULL
)
